title: शनि गायत्री
devanagariText:
॥ श्री शनि गायत्री ॥

ॐ काकध्वजाय विद्महे खड्गहस्ताय धीमहि।
तन्नो मन्दः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ शनैश्चराय विद्महे छायापुत्राय धीमहि।
तन्नो मन्दः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ कृष्णाङ्गाय विद्महे रवितनयाय धीमहि।
तन्नो शनिः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ इति श्री शनि गायत्री सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Shani Gayatri ||

Om Kakadhwajaya Vidmahe Khadgahastaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Mandah Prachodayat.

Om Shanaishcharaya Vidmahe Chhayaputraya Dhimahi.
Tanno Mandah Prachodayat.

Om Krishnaangaya Vidmahe Ravitanayaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Shanih Prachodayat.

|| Iti Shri Shani Gayatri Sampoornam ||
hindiMeaning: हम काक ध्वज वाले, खड्ग धारण करने वाले शनिदेव का ध्यान करते हैं, मन्द गति वाले शनि हमारी बुद्धि को सन्मार्ग पर प्रेरित करें। हम शनैश्चर (धीमी गति वाले), छाया के पुत्र शनि का ध्यान करते हैं। हम कृष्ण अंगों वाले, सूर्यपुत्र शनि का ध्यान करते हैं, वे हमें प्रेरणा प्रदान करें। शनि गायत्री का पाठ शनि दोष शान्ति एवं शनि की कृपा प्राप्ति के लिए अत्यन्त प्रभावशाली है।
benefits: Mitigates the malefic effects of Shani (Saturn) in the horoscope
Traditionally associated with relief during sade sati and shani dhaiya periods
Invokes the blessing of discipline, patience, and perseverance
Traditionally recited for removal of obstacles caused by karmic debts
Invokes justice, longevity, and spiritual wisdom
description: Shani Gayatri (शनि गायत्री) is a powerful Vedic meditation mantra dedicated to Lord Shani Dev. Drawn from Navagraha Stotra Tradition, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Regular recitation is believed to mitigate the malefic effects of Shani (Saturn) in the horoscope, remove obstacles caused by karmic debts, and bestow discipline, patience, and perseverance. It is especially recommended on Saturday (Shanivar) and during Shani Jayanti and Shani Amavasya for maximum spiritual benefit. At 3 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 2 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Shani Gayatri in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Shani Gayatri Mantra in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Powerful mantra to pacify Saturn, reduce Sade Sati effects, and gain Shani Dev's blessings.
